project: OmniPresence Super Engine — Phase 10 Real Results, Real Data

tasks.title: Real backlinks via Common Crawl webgraph + OpenPageRank DR
tasks.acceptance: Backlinks return real referring domains from the webgraph index when ingested; fall back to OpenPageRank DR + an 'estimated' link: result, labeled via data_source. Real per-domain DR feeds link-building.

tasks.title: Real keyword volume/CPC via Google Ads Keyword Planner
tasks.acceptance: Keyword Planner returns real volume/CPC when OAuth-configured (data_source=keyword_planner), else honest 'estimated'; real CPC feeds the paid-ads-equivalent calc with cpcSource.

tasks.title: Keyless Playwright SERP/Maps fallback (env-gated)
tasks.acceptance: When no search API key is set and OMNIDATA_ENABLE_SCRAPE=true, SERP/Maps return real scraped results labeled source=playwright; aspirational 'simulated' label removed.

tasks.title: Real Reddit/Quora mentions + local presence verification
tasks.acceptance: Community fetch_live pulls real Reddit (API) + Quora (SERP) mentions; distribution page verifies real Google Business presence via Serper Places + Apple Business Connect manual status.

tasks.title: Guarantee gated on real measured KPI movement + Tier-1 deliverables
tasks.acceptance: Guarantee cron verifies Tier-2 KPI delta from real scores/visibility + AI referrals and records Tier-1 deterministic deliverables (AEO readiness) + ledger evidence in delta_summary.

tasks.title: JS-render audit + Perplexity-User bot check + Apple Business Connect
tasks.acceptance: Audit flags JS-dependent content (raw vs rendered word ratio), checks Perplexity-User access, and reports Apple Business Connect manual status.

tasks.title: HARO finder + outreach sequences, multi-touch attribution UI, image+multi-language, 10k pSEO + GSC refresh
tasks.acceptance: Journalist/HARO finder + 3-touch outreach sequences; multi-touch attribution models rendered; real image generation + translation; pSEO matrices up to 10k with a GSC-driven refresh selector.

tasks.title: Harden OmniData Docker/compose + fly/railway + parity test
tasks.acceptance: Compose adds persistent DuckDB volume + healthchecks; fly.toml/railway.json present; omnidata:parity passes. Live verify pending user-provisioned host + keys.

tasks.title: Phase 10 spec + manifest v10 + loop skill update
tasks.acceptance: Spec documents every Phase 10 task with files + acceptance + provisioning; manifest v10 lists tasks; loop skill points at v10.
